screens.title: Combat
screens.description: The live encounter surface. Vitals and cast progress must stay glanceable; the host is free to overlay them on the viewport however the platform allows.

views.description: The 3D scene the engine is rendering. AFUI does not transport pixels; it references the surface and lets the host composite the HUD over it.
Health and resource for the controlled character. Low health is the single most safety-relevant signal; make it unmistakable.
Current spell cast. Interrupting movement cancels it; surface the spell name so the player knows what they are losing.
Top-level encounter phase. Each phase reframes the whole HUD; the host picks the discriminated child.
Windowed combat events. This is a bounded tail, never the full fight history; older lines are dropped, not paged.
Primary combat affordances. The host may bind these to keys, buttons, or a gamepad; risk must survive whichever it picks.

actions.label: Attack
actions.description: Sends an attack to the authoritative server. The outcome is resolved remotely; the client only requests it.

actions.label: Use Potion
actions.description: Consumes a potion from inventory and applies its effect. Low stakes but not reversible once drunk.

actions.label: Resurrect
actions.description: Asks the server to resurrect a downed ally. Costs reagents and may fail if the ally has already released.

actions.label: Release Spirit
actions.description: Releases to the graveyard. Ends any chance of an in-combat resurrection for this death.

actions.label: Open Loot
actions.description: Inspects the encounter reward table. Looking does not commit anything.

actions.label: Flee
actions.description: Disengages and runs. Drops combat state but keeps the run alive.

actions.label: Abandon Run
actions.description: Forfeits the entire raid run: the lockout is consumed and all uncollected loot is lost. This cannot be undone.

surface.title: Raid HUD
surface.description: In-game heads-up display for a server-authoritative raid encounter. Proves AFUI carries spatial, temporal, and windowed-stream UI, not only forms and tables.

encounter.hint: Stack behind the pillar before the slam.

recent_events.message: You cast Greater Heal on Tanky.
Maw of the Tide begins to cast Tidal Slam.
Healer2 was struck for 22,140 and died.
